WayBill Number : HAWB 9590726
No and Type of package : 1 Package
Gross Mass : 2.0 Freight 0.0
Insuranc 0.0

Description of Goods Customs Value $ EC Tariff No . Weight ( kg ) Supplementary
I , the undersigned , KERRY FRANK ( FREIGHT 5.00 US ) do hereby declare that the above particulars are true and correct .
Dated this day of 20
